title: Thesis Defense Language
description: Opening, handling hostile questions, protecting the core argument gracefully.
summary_pt_br: Defesa de tese: abertura, perguntas hostis, proteger o núcleo, conceder com graça.

scenes.subtitle_en: Opening, handling hostile questions, protecting the core argument gracefully.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Defesa de tese: abertura, perguntas hostis, proteger o núcleo, conceder com graça.

scenes.text_en: Opening, handling hostile questions, protecting the core argument gracefully. Focus: thesis defense language. Thank you, committee. I'll summarize my argument in five minutes.
scenes.text_pt: Defesa de tese: abertura, perguntas hostis, proteger o núcleo, conceder com graça. Foco: thesis defense language. Obrigada, banca. Resumo em cinco minutos.

scenes.title: Thesis Defense Language
scenes.body_en: Opening: 'Thank you, committee.' Hostile Q: 'That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts.' Deflection: 'That falls outside the scope of this thesis.' Concession: 'I take your point fully.'
scenes.body_pt: Defesa de tese: abertura, perguntas hostis, proteger o núcleo, conceder com graça.

examples.en: Thank you, committee. I'll summarize my argument in five minutes.
examples.pt: Obrigada, banca. Resumo em cinco minutos.

examples.en: That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts.
examples.pt: Ótimo ponto. Permita-me em duas partes.

examples.en: That question falls outside the scope of this thesis.
examples.pt: Essa questão está fora do escopo desta tese.

exercise.question: Complete: "Thank you, ___. I'll summarize my argument in five minutes."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Thank you, committee. I'll summarize my argument in five minutes."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Obrigada, banca. Resumo em cinco minutos.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ótimo ponto. Permita-me em duas partes.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Thesis Defense Language — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre thesis defense language. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you, committee. I'll summarize in five.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Excellent point. Let me address in two parts.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That falls outside the scope of this thesis.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I take your point fully on that detail.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I welcome further discussion. Thank you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Poise in a defense is half the defense itself.

scenes.title: The defense
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four moves Maya makes. Use at least three defense phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the defense chamber, Maya stood before three professors and summarized five years of research in five minutes.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Thank you, committee. My thesis argues that water temperature correlates with coral growth within defined ranges.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Your sample size is twelve — how do you defend generalizability from such a limited dataset?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts — statistical power and external validity.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Fair. Now, one question about the broader climate implications — that may fall outside the scope, correct?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Defending a thesis, Maya realized, is mostly about poise — the quiet ability to protect the ideas you love.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Thesis Defense Language". Opening, handling hostile questions, protecting the core argument gracefully. Thank you, committee. I'll summarize my argument in five minutes. That's an excellent point. Let me address it in two parts. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Thesis Defense Language". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Thesis Defense Language".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Thesis Defense Language".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
